title: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer
display_title: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer
wikitext:
[]: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by ambiva » Sun Nov 22, 2020 4:24 am The picture will help AAA Wunder model from Wave 1/4760 (approx.) Star Destroyer model from Bandai 1/5000 https://imgur.com/XwWZn0J

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Nov 22, 2020 7:19 am For some reason I thought it was smaller haha

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Nov 22, 2020 9:51 am It makes sense. The AAA Wunder has to house two whole Eva Units, and Eva 08 actually ran along the side of the Wunder. The scaling of the Eva Units to both models seems like it was be equally similar just by looking at them.

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by Melkor » Sun Nov 22, 2020 3:20 pm The official canonical length of a Star Destroyer is 1,600 meters (5,259 feet), so from that we can extrapolate the length of the Wunder and possibly that of the EVAs as well, if these models are to scale.

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Nov 22, 2020 3:26 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 22, 2020 4:23 pm Wunder is longer and has a wider span than a Star Destroyer, that's for sure, but the Star Destroyer has more volume and mass based on the design. And of course, which one jumps past lightspeed?

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Nov 23, 2020 7:24 am Yeah but the AAA Wunder shoots 100% natural lasers using environmental friendly energy sources like Unit-01

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Nov 23, 2020 11:11 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Do you know that AAA wunder is as big as Star Destroyer?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Tue Dec 08, 2020 8:14 pm Huh, had no idea. It’s probably smaller than the Star Destroyer. Of course, that ship isn’t even the biggest one the Empire has, or the First Order even.
